_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: None of the 15 control injections of PDE4A1-H229Q resulted in a tumor. The frequency of tumor formation in control mice was not significantly significant.
details: None of the 15 control injections of catalytically-inactive PDE4A1-H229Q resulted in tumor formation
